title: ligularia curvisquama
intro: Ligularia curvisquama, also known as the Japanese gold leaf or Far Eastern ligularia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligularia curvisquama include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
